title: Front End Developer
description: We are seeking a motivated and enthusiastic team member to join our growing team. As a fresher/experience, you will have the opportunity to work on exciting projects and gain valuable experience in the industry. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of React, NodeJS, PHP, JavaScript, and related technologies. If you are passionate about delivering high-quality solutions and are eager to learn and grow, we want to hear from you..
requirements: Strong knowledge of React and its core principles.
Good understanding of JavaScript and its latest features.
Familiarity with state management libraries like Redux or MobX.
Knowledge of modern front-end technologies, such as HTML5, CSS3, and REST APIs.
Experience with Git and version control.
Ability to write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.
Good understanding of responsive design and cross-browser compatibility issues.
Good communication and collaboration skills to work effectively in a team environment.
